Description: Contains ball-by-ball data for every delivery bowled in all IPL matches. Each row represents one delivery and includes: match_id (foreign key to matches), inning number, batting_team, bowling_team, over number, ball number, batsman name, non_striker name, bowler name, is_super_over flag, wide_runs, bye_runs, legbye_runs, noball_runs, penalty_runs, batsman_runs (runs scored off the bat), extra_runs, total_runs, player_dismissed (name of the dismissed batsman or null if no wicket), dismissal_kind (e.g. caught, bowled, run out, lbw, stumped, hit wicket, retired hurt, obstructing the field). IMPORTANT: there is NO 'fielder' column — the table does NOT record which fielder took a catch or effected a runout. Queries about who took the most catches or who effected the most runouts CANNOT be answered from this table.

Contains match-level summary data for all IPL matches. Each row represents one match and includes: id (primary key), season (year as integer), city, date, team1, team2, toss_winner, toss_decision (bat or field), result (normal or tie or no result), dl_applied flag, winner (winning team name), win_by_runs, win_by_wickets, player_of_match, venue, umpire1, umpire2, and umpire3.
